changelog: 1.5 (2026-07-19): v1.5 advisory smoke fixture (checks #24/#25/#26 + the #20 family_contract arm).

overview: Smoke fixture for the v1.5 advisories. Expectations (all WARNINGS; validator exits 0, draft): #24 fires on TSK-002 (module-kind implementation with zero dependents in this file); #25 fires on TSK-003 (description enumerates two backticked paths while target_files pins one file); #26 fires on TSK-004 (integration task naming callee process_rows without depending on TSK-003); the #20 family_contract arm fires on TSK-005 (embedded gate-units entry drifts from ARCH__svc.yaml on inputs). A pre-1.5 copy of this file would emit NONE of #24/#25/#26 (version-gated).

tasks.title: Define the export schema models
tasks.description: Author the row/report model definitions the exporter consumes.

tasks.title: Implement row processing
tasks.description: Implement row transformation across `src/svc/parse.py` and `src/svc/transform.py` (parser + transformer halves).
acceptance: process_rows() transforms a parsed row list

tasks.title: Wire the export path
tasks.description: Wire the export seam: the entry path calls process_rows on the parsed batch before writing the report.
acceptance: the export wiring module connects parse and write

tasks.title: Implement the export entrypoint
tasks.unit_summary: Export entrypoint: argv in, exit code out.
tasks.description: Implement the export entrypoint owning arg parsing and exit semantics.
